allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:5077/api/state -TimeoutSec 10; $r | Select-Object connected, error, last_update, in_session | ConvertTo-Json; "SNAPSHOT:"; $r.snapshot | ConvertTo-Json; "ACCOUNT:"; $r.account | ConvertTo-Json; "SIGNAL:"; $r.signal | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4 } catch { "API not up yet: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
